name: OpenClaw Translate — Nemotron
description: Translates Japanese messages to English before LLM processing, then translates English responses back to Japanese. Uses Nemotron via Ollama Cloud for translation. Enable this plugin to practice English while receiving Japanese responses.

injectSystemPrompt.description: Inject English system prompt after translation so LLM responds in English

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable automatic J→E→J translation via Nemotron on Ollama Cloud

model.label: Translation Model
model.help: Ollama Cloud model to use. Default: nemotron-3-super:120b-cloud

injectSystemPrompt.label: Inject English System Prompt
injectSystemPrompt.help: After translating input to English, inject a system prompt so the LLM responds in English
